# SPARQL Competency Questions

One file per SAMOD iteration (`NN.md`), mirroring `development/NN/formal-competency-questions.md`: the formal competency questions validated against the consolidated model (`ontology/triple.ttl`) after each merge/refactor phase.

**Do not edit these files directly** — update the iteration's `formal-competency-questions.md` and re-copy it here. All 153 queries are executable with `rdflib` against the corresponding iteration's `TBOX.ttl` + `ABOX.ttl`.
